hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ]; then if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.env|credentials|secret'; then echo "BLOCKED: $file may contain secrets. Edit manually." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.env|credentials|secret'; then echo "BLOCKED: $file may contain secrets. Edit manually." >&2; exit 2; fi
file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && [ -f "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *.go) gofmt -w "$file" 2>/dev/null && echo "gofmt: $file" ;; esac; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gh pr merge'; then echo 'PR merged. Run /post-merge-cleanup to update main, clean worktrees, and delete branches.'; fi
